name: The Sandy Pickle - The Village Dallas
about: The Sandy Pickle is an all-in-one sports entertainment venue offering golf simulators alongside pickleball, sand volleyball, and private event spaces. The venue features a comprehensive food and beverage program with a food truck, full bar, and dedicated weekend food truck events. Golfers can book courts through The Sandy Pickle app, which provides a user-friendly platform for reservations across all sports offerings. The facility is designed for both casual play and group events, with a focus on creating a fun, accessible environment for sports enthusiasts of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: All-in-one entertainment venue with golf simulators alongside other sports
Easy booking through the dedicated mobile app
Food and beverage options available on-site
Hosts private events and group reservations
Winner of Best Place to Play Pickleball in Dallas, indicating quality facility

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food truck with snacks and treats, plus special weekend food truck events (Truck Yeah!)

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental availability. It's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for equipment options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not mentioned as allowed. The venue offers an on-site food truck and full bar with various food and beverage options available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing for 18-hole rounds. Golf simulator sessions are typically booked by the hour, so the duration depends on how many hours you reserve and your pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Sandy Pickle appears to be family-friendly with multiple sports offerings, food options, and mentions of group events suitable for various ages.
